changes.commit: **Feedback / Loop**: Now use separate nodes for input and output.
**Group**: Fix incorrect connection when ungrouping a group.
**Group**: Fix crash when trying to group nodes with multiple connections to the same junction.
Alt+Right click where context menu can appear now create modifiable pie menu.
**Group Output**: Fix palette input datatype got converted into 2d color arrays.
**Group IO**: Remove name-only mode when zoom out.
